response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven ability to lead technical projects across diverse stacks and domains (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring experience via workshops and frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — core required expertise
Career gap since Oct 2025 and recent role at re:cinq is only 7 months, raising questions about sustained AI focus
Lacks documented experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers or managing cloud AI production deployments
